Interface Validator<T>

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface Validator<T>

  • Method Details

    • validate

      ValidationResult validate(T value)
      Parameters:
      value - The value to validate
      Returns:
      The validation result for the provided value

    • ofPredicate

      static <T> Validator<T> ofPredicate(Predicate<T> predicate, net.minecraft.network.chat.Component errorMessage)
      Creates a validator from a Predicate and an error message.
      Parameters:
      predicate - The predicate for checking whether a value is valid. Should return true for valid values
      errorMessage - The error message for invalid values
      Returns:
      The validator
